allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); v=[s for s in d['streams'] if s['codec_type']=='video'][0]; print\(f\\"Duration: {v.get\('duration','N/A'\)}s\\nFPS: {v.get\('r_frame_rate','N/A'\)}\\nResolution: {v.get\('width'\)}x{v.get\('height'\)}\\nTotal frames: {v.get\('nb_frames','N/A'\)}\\"\)")
